content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt says "public beta" and "still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges" (release_notes.txt:1-2)
Pierre: Apple rejects App Store builds whose store-facing copy implies the release is unfinished, since production submissions must not be beta or trial versions (that's what TestFlight is for). Your release notes explicitly call this a "public beta" and warn users to "expect rough edges," which may trigger review questions. Rewrite the notes to describe the finished feature (e.g., "New: task sync across devices") and move any real beta testing to TestFlight.
